title: Fix is_even() parity check
body:
## Problem

In `even_bug/numbers.py`, `is_even(n)` returns the wrong boolean for parity.

`is_even(2)` should be True and `is_even(3)` should be False. Currently the implementation uses `n % 2 == 1`, which inverts the result.

## Expected

Return True iff `n` is divisible by 2: `return n % 2 == 0`.

## Acceptance

All tests in `tests/test_numbers.py` pass.
notes: Local one-line logic bug for offline eval.
